title: Urgent Opening Teacher at iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Teacher in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd:
iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd!
